---
title: "Brandon Scott"
image: about_img.jpg
about:
  template: broadside
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 15eme
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/thebscott/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/thebayesianbandit

---

We are surrounded by systems every single day. Grocery store layouts, highways, factories, and a plethora of other systems influence the ways we make decisions. This blog is a portfolio of cases that demonstrate systems thinking within various domains. If you have any questions or want to chat, feel free to connect on LinkedIn. 

## Education
Brigham Young University
MBA | September 2024 - September 2025 (dropout)

Texas A&M University
M.S. in Statistics | January 2023 - May 2024

Utah Valley University
M.S. in Computer Science | September 2021 - April 2022 (transferred)

Brigham Young University
B.S. in Actuarial Science | September 2017 - April 2021

## Experience
Uber | Data Analyst | October 2022 - July 2023
AdvancedMD | Senior Business Analyst | July 2021 - October 2022

### Support This Site

If you enjoy the content of this site, feel free to support!
```{=html}
<div style="margin-top: 20px;">
  <a href="https://www.buymeacoffee.com/thebayesianbandit" target="_blank" class="btn btn-outline-primary" role="button">
    <i class="bi bi-ice-cream"></i> Buy Me an Ice Cream
  </a>
</div>
